MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: JAMES BARON'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT OF RECEIVER; REQ. FOR APPROVAL OF FEES AND DISCHARGE OF RECEIVER; FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT OF RECEIVER IS GRANTED. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THAT THE RECEIVER SHALL DISBURSE $42,165.08 TO HIMSELF FROM THE RECEIVERSHIP BANK ACCOUNT AS FULL PAYMENT OF HIS FEES AND EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797 301/PHA

BARON IS APPOINTED AS RECEIVER AND A BOND OF $20,000.00 TO BE POSTED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR # 13358 301/PHA
